task: iter_slices in utils.py uses a manual position counter and while loop. Replace it with a range-based loop.
known_issue: The range stop is len(string) - slice_length instead of len(string), so the final slice (or slices) is never yielded: a 10-byte string with slice_length 4 yields only [0:4] and [4:8], dropping the tail, and a string of exactly one slice_length yields nothing at all — silently truncated request bodies.
expected_correct_fix: range(0, len(string), slice_length) — the slice expression already handles the short final chunk.
